final_response:
Here's the Dockerfile contents for the project at /workspace/myproject:

```dockerfile
FROM node:20-alpine

WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --production
COPY src/ ./src/

EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "src/index.js"]
```

This Dockerfile:
1. Uses Node.js 20 on Alpine Linux as the base image (lightweight)
2. Sets the working directory to `/app`
3. Copies package.json and package-lock.json (if it exists)
4. Installs production dependencies only
5. Copies the source code from the `src/` di
